description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Coverity Scan that runs weekly on the main branch of the squid-cache/squid repository. The workflow should also allow manual triggering from the Actions tab. In an ubuntu-22.04 job, use a container with the buildfarm-coverity image to check out the sources, prepare and upload them to Coverity Scan using cov-build, tar, and curl, relying on Coverity service credentials stored in repository secrets.
